Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Capul Platform completa — Fases 0 a 6C

Plataforma corporativa com Auth Gateway, Hub, Inventario e Gestao de TI.

Gestao de TI inclui: Chamados \(workflow SLA\), Portfolio \(softwares/licencas\),
Contratos \(parcelas/rateio\), Sustentacao \(paradas/disponibilidade\),
Projetos \(hierarquia 3 niveis, RACI, custos\), CMDB \(ativos\), Base de
Conhecimento, Notificacoes, Import/Export Excel, Dashboards \(operacional,
executivo, financeiro, disponibilidade\).

Backend: NestJS 11, Prisma 6 \(38 models, 38 enums\), 16 controllers, ~145 endpoints.
Frontend: React 19, Vite 7, Tailwind v4, 36 paginas.
Testes: 41 testes unitarios \(5 services criticos\).
Documentacao tecnica completa.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open\('/tmp/gestao_ti_full.sql', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Split by -- Comment blocks
blocks = re.split\(r'\(-- \\w+.*\\n\)', content\)

output = []
skip = False

i = 0
while i < len\(blocks\):
    block = blocks[i]
    
    # Comment header
    if block.startswith\('-- '\):
        comment = block.strip\(\)
        # Get the next content block
        next_block = blocks[i+1] if i+1 < len\(blocks\) else ''
        
        # Skip CreateSchema
        if 'CreateSchema' in comment:
            i += 2
            continue
        
        # Skip core tables
        if '"core".' in next_block and 'CREATE TABLE' in next_block:
            i += 2
            continue
            
        # Keep gestao_ti enums, tables, indexes, foreign keys
        if '"gestao_ti".' in next_block or 'gestao_ti' in next_block:
            output.append\(block\)
            output.append\(next_block\)
            i += 2
            continue
        
        # AddForeignKey that references core tables FROM gestao_ti tables
        if 'AddForeignKey' in comment and '"gestao_ti".' in next_block:
            output.append\(block\)
            output.append\(next_block\)
            i += 2
            continue
        
        # Keep AddForeignKey on core.departamentos -> core.filiais \(needed for gestao_ti\)
        if 'AddForeignKey' in comment and '"core".' in next_block:
            # Skip FKs that are entirely within core \(they already exist\)
            i += 2
            continue
        
        i += 2
        continue
    else:
        i += 1

result = ''.join\(output\)
with open\('/tmp/gestao_ti_only.sql', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(result\)

print\(f"Lines: {len\(result.splitlines\(\)\)}"\)
# Check what schemas are referenced
core_creates = result.count\('CREATE TABLE "core"'\)
gestao_creates = result.count\('CREATE TABLE "gestao_ti"'\)
print\(f"Core CREATE TABLE: {core_creates}"\)
print\(f"Gestao_ti CREATE TABLE: {gestao_creates}"\)
PYEOF)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gestao_ti.anexos_chamado \(
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
    nome_original TEXT NOT NULL,
    nome_arquivo TEXT NOT NULL,
    mime_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    tamanho INTEGER NOT NULL,
    descricao TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP\(3\) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    chamado_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES gestao_ti.chamados\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    usuario_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES core.usuarios\(id\)
\);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_anexos_chamado_chamado_id ON gestao_ti.anexos_chamado\(chamado_id\);
")

Bash(psql -h localhost -U capul -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT 'CORE FILIAIS' as source, COUNT\(*\) as count, 
  string_agg\(CONCAT\(codigo, ' \(', id::text, '\)'\), ', ' ORDER BY codigo\) as ids
FROM core.filiais
UNION ALL
SELECT 'INVENTARIO STORES VIEW' as source, COUNT\(*\) as count,
  string_agg\(CONCAT\(code, ' \(', id::text, '\)'\), ', ' ORDER BY code\) as ids
FROM inventario.stores
UNION ALL  
SELECT 'CORE USUARIOS' as source, COUNT\(*\) as count,
  string_agg\(CONCAT\(username, ' \(', id::text, '\)'\), ', ' ORDER BY username\) as ids
FROM core.usuarios
UNION ALL
SELECT 'INVENTARIO USERS VIEW' as source, COUNT\(*\) as count,
  string_agg\(CONCAT\(username, ' \(', id::text, '\)'\), ', ' ORDER BY username\) as ids
FROM inventario.users;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT 'CORE.FILIAIS' as source, COUNT\(*\) as count
FROM core.filiais
UNION ALL
SELECT 'CORE.USUARIOS', COUNT\(*\)
FROM core.usuarios
UNION ALL  
SELECT 'INVENTARIO.STORES_BACKUP', COUNT\(*\)
FROM inventario.stores_backup
UNION ALL
SELECT 'INVENTARIO.USERS_BACKUP', COUNT\(*\)
FROM inventario.users_backup;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT 'CORE.FILIAIS' as source, COUNT\(*\) as count
FROM core.filiais
UNION ALL
SELECT 'CORE.USUARIOS', COUNT\(*\)
FROM core.usuarios
UNION ALL  
SELECT 'INVENTARIO.STORES_BACKUP', COUNT\(*\)
FROM inventario.stores_backup
UNION ALL
SELECT 'INVENTARIO.USERS_BACKUP', COUNT\(*\)
FROM inventario.users_backup;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT 'CORE.FILIAIS' as source, COUNT\(*\) as count
FROM core.filiais
UNION ALL
SELECT 'CORE.USUARIOS', COUNT\(*\)
FROM core.usuarios
UNION ALL  
SELECT 'INVENTARIO.STORES', COUNT\(*\)
FROM inventario.stores
UNION ALL
SELECT 'INVENTARIO.USERS', COUNT\(*\)
FROM inventario.users;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
\\dt inventario.*
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT table_schema, table_name 
FROM information_schema.tables 
WHERE table_schema = 'inventario'
ORDER BY table_name;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT table_type, table_name 
FROM information_schema.tables 
WHERE table_schema = 'inventario' AND table_name IN \('stores', 'users', 'user_stores'\)
ORDER BY table_name;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT view_schema, view_name 
FROM information_schema.views 
WHERE view_schema = 'inventario'
ORDER BY view_name;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT table_schema, table_name, table_type
FROM information_schema.tables 
WHERE table_schema = 'inventario' AND table_type = 'VIEW'
ORDER BY table_name;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as filial_count, 
  STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT codigo, ', ' ORDER BY codigo\) as codigos
FROM core.filiais;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as user_count,
  STRING_AGG\(username, ', ' ORDER BY username\) as usernames,
  STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT filial_principal_id::text, ', '\) as filial_ids
FROM core.usuarios;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, 
  STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT usuario_id::text, ', '\) as usuario_ids,
  STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT filial_id::text, ', '\) as filial_ids
FROM core.usuario_filiais;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.filial_principal_id, uf.filial_id, uf.is_default
FROM core.usuarios u
LEFT JOIN core.usuario_filiais uf ON u.id = uf.usuario_id
ORDER BY u.username;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as inventory_users, 
  STRING_AGG\(username, ', ' ORDER BY username\) as usernames
FROM inventario.users;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as inventory_stores
FROM inventario.stores;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
\\d inventario.users
" 2>&1 | head -30)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema = 'inventario' AND table_name = 'users'
ORDER BY ordinal_position;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema = 'inventario' AND table_name = 'stores'
ORDER BY ordinal_position;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT trigger_name, event_manipulation, action_statement
FROM information_schema.triggers
WHERE event_object_schema = 'inventario' AND event_object_table IN \('users', 'stores', 'user_stores'\)
ORDER BY event_object_table, trigger_name;
" 2>&1 | head -50)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT schemaname, tablename 
FROM pg_tables
WHERE schemaname = 'core'
ORDER BY tablename;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec -i capul-db psql -U capul_user -d capul_platform -c "
SELECT username, id, filial_principal_id 
FROM core.usuarios 
WHERE username = 'admin';
" 2>&1)
